title: rubus × albifolius
intro: Rubus × albifolius is a hybrid plant, specifically a cross between the European raspberry and the black raspberry, characterized by its white flowers and edible fruits. The medicinal properties of Rubus × albifolius include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Rubus × albifolius can be made into teas, tinctures, and jams, which are often used to promote digestive health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
